items.title: Reconcile with the chip session
steps: 1. Inspect task_99606846's worktree in the renderer repo
items.expected: One starting branch, no duplicate implementations
items.evidence: Worktree .claude/worktrees/eager-williamson-393d54 at 8e120cf (= main), zero commits, zero uncommitted changes — nothing to adopt. Recorded in spec Rev 1.
items.notes: The alloro-repo generator chip (task_cfd3c6f7) was also inspected: equally empty, based on a month-old commit. Both idle sessions safe to close.

items.title: Archived-project gating (410)
steps: 1. whereNull(archived_at) on both project lookups + dedicated archived lookups
3. curl both known ghosts + real sites
items.expected: Archived hosts stop serving content; real sites unaffected
items.evidence: swift-medical-7604.sites.getalloro.com returns 410 with the archived template. garrison-orthodontics-3307's row was deleted from the DB by another actor before deploy, so it returns 404 site-not-found — duplicate equally dead. All 5 sampled real pages 200.

items.title: Canonical/og:url self-derivation
steps: 1. injectSeoMeta gains ServingContext; canonical/og:url always emitted; stored honored only when it names this exact page on this site (www/slash-insensitive)
2. Verify an indexed-style canonical is preserved verbatim
3. Verify a never-repaired site now emits a canonical where none existed
items.expected: No churn on correct stored values; junk/missing replaced with self-derived
items.evidence: One Endo /locations/fredericksburg-office still emits its stored www-style canonical byte-identically. caswellorthodontics.com/articles/are-adult-braces-right-for-me (98 posts had no canonical before) now emits the correct self-referencing canonical — platform-wide backstop confirmed live.

items.title: robots.txt + sitemap.xml
steps: 2. Sitemap from published pages + posts, absolute URLs on the primary host, Redis-cached
3. Verify entry counts against known DB counts on all 4 audited sites
items.expected: Valid XML/robots on every site; counts match published content
items.evidence: Counts exact: One Endo 140 (19 pages + 121 posts), Artful 99 (15+84), Garrison 59 (10+49), getalloro 13 (13+0). robots.txt references the sitemap. Keys included in the flush.
items.notes: Deliberate minor inconsistency recorded in Rev 1: sitemap locs use the bare primary host while some sites' canonicals use www — canonicals stay authoritative and untouched.

items.title: Soft-404 -> real 404 (shipped last, gated on the link audit + redirects)
items.precondition: Plans A redirects + pre-flip audit redirects landed
steps: 1. SQL link audit across ALL live sites (page sections + post content + header/footer/wrapper + menu items) vs valid paths (pages ∪ posts ∪ redirects ∪ specials)
2. 21 redirect rows inserted for every real broken link (verified targets)
items.expected: Nonsense paths 404; every nav link and legacy URL still resolves via page or 301
items.evidence: Nonsense path on One Endo: 404 with branded template. Old redirects (/fredericksburg-office), Plan A redirects (/dentist-gainesville-insider-tips), and pre-flip audit redirects (/home, getalloro /consultation, /blog/*) all 301 to 200 targets. Favicon refs and generated-hostname-only prototype sites triaged as non-blockers (already broken today / not crawled).

items.title: Fixed ?nocache=1 flush (Rev 1 scope addition)
steps: 1. Replace keys()+del(...) with SCAN + per-key DEL (cluster Redis: KEYS disabled, CROSSSLOT on multi-key DEL)
2. Prove live: flush then immediately observe a change that was invisible before it
items.expected: Pattern flush actually clears cache on the production cluster
items.evidence: getalloro /consultation redirect (row present in DB, invisible via cache) fired immediately after a single ?nocache=1 request post-deploy — the same sequence that provably did nothing under the old flush.

items.title: Build + deploy
items.expected: Clean build, successful deploy, healthy sites
items.evidence: tsc exit 0. Deploy run completed success in 26s. Post-deploy: 5/5 sampled real pages 200 across all 4 audited sites.
